description: Partial no-noise PF replay was stopped after station 1 because exact 2000-particle sequential replay was too slow for diagnostic iteration. It still shows early degeneracy on noiseless data.
synthetic_observation: Exact PF response generated from the true three Cs-137 sources plus PF background_level=5 cps.
interpretation: Noiseless data did not produce immediate stable recovery; the sequential PF path suffered severe early degeneracy before all discriminative views were used. Full replay was not completed because station 2 was still running after several additional minutes.
